justification: All 6 ACs implemented: AC1-AC2 via STATUS_MAP, AC3 handles both FAILED and DECLINED, AC4 uses logger.warn (not logger.error) and returns 'unknown', AC5 uses toFixed(2)+parseFloat for correct decimal handling (not integer division), AC6 handles both null and undefined. 16 tests cover all 6 ACs with explicit describe blocks per criterion. AC3 tested with both inputs. AC4 tests verify logger.warn called (and verify no-warn for known statuses). Logger is injected (not global). acceptance_criteria_coverage present and maps all 6 ACs. No external dependencies.

observations.text: AC3 explicitly tested with both FAILED and DECLINED inputs in separate test cases
AC4 includes 4 tests covering unknown statuses plus a negative test verifying no warn for known statuses
AC5 tested with multiple values including 199->1.99 which requires proper rounding
AC6 tested with both undefined and null customer_name
acceptance_criteria_coverage thoroughly maps all 6 ACs with test references
Extra edge cases (empty string status, lowercase status, zero amount) show thoroughness beyond minimum requirements
